title: Refactor handle_slash into per-command functions with dispatch table
description:
handle_slash (lines 853-1256) is 404 lines implementing 17 commands in a single match. This creates giant function hard to navigate and test.

Refactor into cmd_quit(), cmd_help(), cmd_pay(), etc. with dispatch table.

Benefits: independently testable commands, easier to add/remove, clearer code organization.
close_reason: deferred to backlog; P3/P4 style issues, not blocking epic completion
